open_feedback: It does what I need about eighty percent of the time, the other twenty percent I work around
Compared to what we used before, this is a huge improvement, but the bar was pretty low
Switching between projects is painfully slow, there's no quick switcher
I accidentally sent an incomplete report to a client because the save and send buttons are right next to each other
It took me way too long to figure out how to invite my team
The onboarding emails were genuinely helpful, they came at the right pace
The fact that I can't undo a bulk action makes me nervous every time I use it Though I'd add: i couldn't find where to change my settings, i ended up googling it
When I saw the new design, my first reaction was, where did everything go?
